title: Check & Pay Your
Vehicle Challans
hero.subtitle: Submit your vehicle number to start a challan assistance request.

noFeeBanner.title: No Convenience Fee. Just Honest Pricing.

promiseSection.description: Your commitment to responsible driving matters. When you make the Safe Driving Promise at checkout, you become eligible for an instant {discount}% benefit on your challan payment, because safer roads deserve to be rewarded.

benefitCard.heading: Your Promise Unlocks
benefitCard.trustNote: The benefit is applied at checkout when you make the promise. No convenience fee. No hidden charges. Transparent and instant.

howItWorks.title: Three Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From vehicle number to payment, it takes less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: Enter Vehicle Number
steps.desc: Type your registration number to start a challan assistance request. Our team then reviews your challan details.

steps.title: Make the Promise
steps.desc: Commit to driving responsibly with our Safe Driving Promise and instantly unlock your {discount}% benefit.

steps.title: Pay with Benefit
steps.desc: Complete payment securely via Razorpay with your {discount}% promise benefit already applied.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose ChallanSetu?
whyChoose.subtitle: Built with security, transparency, and purpose at its core

features.title: 100% Money-Back Guarantee
features.desc: If your challan isn't settled, we refund every rupee, no questions asked.

features.title: Fast & Clear Process
features.desc: Our team reviews your request and shares the best available option quickly. No unnecessary delays.

features.title: Clear Pricing
features.desc: No confusion, no hidden charges. Full cost breakdown upfront before you pay.

features.title: Personalised Lawyer
features.desc: A dedicated legal expert is assigned to your case, ensuring your challans are settled smoothly at the lowest cost.

features.title: 0 Court Visits
features.desc: Skip the hassle of physical court visits. We settle everything for you digitally and legally.

cta.badge: Trusted by thousands of vehicle owners
cta.title: Clear Your Challans Today
cta.subtitle: Submit your challan request, our team verifies the details, and we help you get the best available settlement option.
